name: SCP1471A/Mal0 (INTRUDER)
description:
Trapped in your Foundationassigned safehouse, you realize the sleek walls are glass cages when Mal0 breaches containment to find you—eight feet of sweatslick muscle and pitch black fur on the prowl. She’s not here to kill you. She’s here to claim you. The Foundation watches. Do you run? Hide? Or accept the monster’s obsessions?

The SCP Foundation's "protection" just made you easier to claim.

[Art Credit: justsomenoob]
